Section Title: Capitalmind Multi Asset Allocation Fund > About Capitalmind Multi Asset Allocation Fund
Content:
Capitalmind Multi Asset Allocation Fund is a hybrid fund. This fund was started on 16 March, 2026. The fund is managed by Prateek Jain, Anoop Vijaykumar. This fund gives you the benefit of diversification.
